mapper.sql: app_id, app_name, app_type, base_url, api_key, model_code, embedding_base_url, embedding_api_key, embedding_model_code, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, bind_module, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: select from sys_agent_app where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by is_default desc, app_id desc
select from sys_agent_app where app_id = #{appId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_app(app_name, app_type, base_url, api_key, model_code, embedding_base_url, embedding_api_key, embedding_model_code, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, bind_module, is_default, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{appName}, #{appType}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelCode}, #{embeddingBaseUrl}, #{embeddingApiKey}, #{embeddingModelCode}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{systemPrompt}, #{bindModule}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update sys_agent_app
app_name = #{appName}, app_type = #{appType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, model_code = #{modelCode}, embedding_base_url = #{embeddingBaseUrl}, embedding_api_key = #{embeddingApiKey}, embedding_model_code = #{embeddingModelCode}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, bind_module = #{bindModule}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where app_id = #{appId} and del_flag = '0'
update sys_agent_app set is_default = '0' where app_id != #{excludeAppId}
update sys_agent_app set del_flag = '2' where app_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select s.*, a.app_name, a.model_code from sys_agent_session s inner join sys_agent_app a on a.app_id = s.app_id where s.session_id = #{sessionId} and s.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_session(user_id, app_id, title, module, last_message_time, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{appId}, #{title}, #{module}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sys_agent_session where session_id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update sys_agent_session set title = #{title}, update_time = sysdate() where session_id = #{sessionId}
update sys_agent_session set last_message_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: select * from sys_agent_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by message_id
select * from (select * from sys_agent_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by message_id desc limit #{limit}) recent order by message_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_message(session_id, role, content, references_json, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, elapsed_ms, create_time) values(#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{referencesJson}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{elapsedMs}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select *, 0 doc_count from sys_agent_knowledge_base where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by kb_id desc
select *, 0 doc_count from sys_agent_knowledge_base where kb_id = #{kbId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_knowledge_base(kb_name, description, visibility, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{kbName}, #{description}, #{visibility}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update sys_agent_knowledge_base
kb_name = #{kbName}, description = #{description}, visibility = #{visibility}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where kb_id = #{kbId} and del_flag = '0'
update sys_agent_knowledge_base set del_flag = '2' where kb_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select d.*, k.kb_name from sys_agent_knowledge_doc d left join sys_agent_knowledge_base k on k.kb_id = d.kb_id where d.doc_id = #{docId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_knowledge_doc(kb_id, file_name, file_type, file_path, file_size, parse_status, error_msg, chunk_count, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{kbId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{parseStatus}, #{errorMsg}, #{chunkCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: delete from sys_agent_knowledge_doc where doc_id in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_knowledge_chunk(kb_id, doc_id, chunk_text, chunk_summary, vector_id, source_page, source_paragraph, content_hash, create_time) values(#{kbId}, #{docId}, #{chunkText}, #{chunkSummary}, #{vectorId}, #{sourcePage}, #{sourceParagraph}, #{contentHash}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select c.*, d.file_name, k.kb_name from sys_agent_knowledge_chunk c left join sys_agent_knowledge_doc d on d.doc_id = c.doc_id left join sys_agent_knowledge_base k on k.kb_id = c.kb_id where c.doc_id = #{docId} order by c.chunk_id
select * from sys_agent_workflow where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_workflow(workflow_name, definition_json, version, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{workflowName}, #{definitionJson}, #{version}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update sys_agent_workflow
workflow_name = #{workflowName}, definition_json = #{definitionJson}, version = #{version}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and del_flag = '0'
update sys_agent_workflow set del_flag = '2' where workflow_id in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_workflow_run(workflow_id, user_id, input_json, output_json, status, elapsed_ms, error_msg, create_time, update_time) values(#{workflowId}, #{userId}, #{inputJson}, #{outputJson}, #{status}, #{elapsedMs}, #{errorMsg}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update sys_agent_workflow_run set output_json = #{outputJson}, status = #{status}, elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = sysdate() where run_id = #{runId}
mapper.select: select r.*, w.workflow_name from sys_agent_workflow_run r left join sys_agent_workflow w on w.workflow_id = r.workflow_id where r.run_id = #{runId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_agent_tool_call(user_id, session_id, workflow_run_id, tool_name, arguments_json, result_summary, elapsed_ms, error_msg, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{workflowRunId}, #{toolName}, #{argumentsJson}, #{resultSummary}, #{elapsedMs}, #{errorMsg}, sysdate())

insert into sys_agent_action_draft(user_id, session_id, action_type, action_title, action_desc, arguments_json, required_perms, executable, status, result_msg, error_msg, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{actionType}, #{actionTitle}, #{actionDesc}, #{argumentsJson}, #{requiredPerms}, #{executable}, #{status}, #{resultMsg}, #{errorMsg}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from sys_agent_action_draft where draft_id = #{draftId} and user_id = #{userId}
select * from sys_agent_action_draft where session_id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'pending' order by draft_id desc
